message:
fix(engine): correct Track F bead IDs from FRX-11.6 to FRX-07.1

Track F toolchain ecosystem adoption sprint documents, test suite, and
gate script were referencing incorrect bead identifiers:

- bd-mjh3.11.6 → bd-mjh3.7.1
- FRX-11.6 → FRX-07.1
- FE-FRX-11-6 → FE-FRX-07-1

This corrects the bead lineage to match the actual issue tracker entry
and ensures the gate script validates against the right bead chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 # FRX Track F Toolchain/Ecosystem/Adoption Sprint Charter v1
 
 Status: active
-Primary bead: bd-mjh3.11.6
-Track id: FRX-11.6
+Primary bead: bd-mjh3.7.1
+Track id: FRX-07.1
 Machine-readable contract: `docs/frx_track_f_toolchain_ecosystem_adoption_sprint_v1.json`
 
 ## Charter Scope

@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ trace_id="trace-frx-track-f-toolchain-ecosystem-adoption-sprint-${timestamp}"
 decision_id="decision-frx-track-f-toolchain-ecosystem-adoption-sprint-${timestamp}"
 policy_id="policy-frx-track-f-toolchain-ecosystem-adoption-sprint-v1"
 component="frx_track_f_toolchain_ecosystem_adoption_sprint_gate"
-scenario_id="frx-11.6"
+scenario_id="frx-07.1"
 replay_command="${0} ${mode}"
 
 mkdir -p "$run_dir"
@@ -116,7 +116,7 @@ write_manifest() {
     error_code_json="null"
   else
     outcome="fail"
-    error_code_json='"FE-FRX-11-6-GATE-0001"'
+    error_code_json='"FE-FRX-07-1-GATE-0001"'
   fi
 
   git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
@@ -135,7 +135,7 @@ write_manifest() {
   {
     echo "{"
     echo '  "schema_version": "frx.track-f.toolchain-ecosystem-adoption-sprint-gate.run-manifest.v1",'
-    echo '  "bead_id": "bd-mjh3.11.6",'
+    echo '  "bead_id": "bd-mjh3.7.1",'
     echo "  \"component\": \"${component}\","
     echo "  \"scenario_id\": \"${scenario_id}\","
     echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
